---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: '[Bug]: '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what's wrong.

## Command run

```
talentflow ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Paste terminal output if relevant (redact any API keys!).

## Environment

- OS: [Windows / Linux / macOS / Android-Termux]
- Node.js version: `node -v`
- TalentFlow version: `talentflow --version`
- AI provider (if relevant): [anthropic / openai / openrouter / none]

## Additional context

Anything else that might help (sample resume/JD format, screenshots, etc).
